message:
fix(h2): prevent headers_complete corruption and CONTINUATION on closed streams

recv_headers() was setting headers_complete before validating the state
transition. On a closed stream, a rejected recv_headers(false, false)
would corrupt headers_complete to false, allowing recv_continuation()
to accumulate CONTINUATION fragments on the closed stream.

Fix: defer headers_complete update until after state validation succeeds.
Add defense-in-depth state check to recv_continuation() that rejects
frames on closed streams regardless of headers_complete.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
